scenes.speaker: AHMICK
scenes.text:
No worries, you don't have to share your name.
Anyways, welcome to my portfolio!

scenes.speaker: AHMICK
scenes.text:
Any questions you have for me?
I am more than willing to answer them.
Throw them all at me!

choices.text: What skills do you have to offer?
Do you have any finished projects you are willing to showcase?
I am interested! How can I contact you further?

scenes.speaker: AHMICK
scenes.text: Glad you asked! I was going to tell you more about me, anyway.

scenes.speaker: AHMICK
scenes.text:
Once again, hey! I'm Ahmick, and I'm a junior developer.
I am a recent Bachelor of Science graduate majoring in Computer Science from the University of Canterbury.

scenes.speaker: AHMICK
scenes.text:
I am Filipino-born, and moved to New Zealand with my parents back in 2014.
I was homeschooled from 2014 until 2016 when I started studying at Aidanfield Christian School for Years 8 through 10 in 2018.
In 2019, I moved to Middleton Grange School for Year 11 through 13, where I gained my interest in programming.

choices.text: Are you much of a traveller?
